response.original_title: 東京ディズニーリゾート 35周年 アニバーサリー・セレクション －東京ディズニーリゾート 35周年 Happiest Celebration！
response.overview: To commemorate the 35th anniversary of Tokyo Disney Resort, "Tokyo Disney Resort 35th Anniversary Selection" is now on sale. This product includes "Fashionable Easter," a glamorous and fashionable Easter that is unique to Tokyo DisneySea(R), "Brilliant Water! Summer Beat", "The Villains World", a "cool and mysterious Halloween" by the Disney Villains, and "Tokyo Disney Resort 35th Anniversary Happiest Celebration! The program also includes "Tokyo Disney Resort 35th Anniversary Happiest Celebration!
response.tagline: A new world that extends forever. The excitement of not knowing what will happen. The best memories of that time will always be with you.
response.title: Tokyo Disney Resort 35th Anniversary: Happiest Celebration
